author: gb9t
content:
Iter Phase C continues — 2 more high-impact Tier-3s + commit d8bcd90 landed (68 files / 7247 insertions covering Phase B + early Phase C):

- drivers/nvme/host-core.md: covers drivers/nvme/host/core.c — NVMe arch- + transport-agnostic core: per-controller (struct nvme_ctrl) + per-namespace (struct nvme_ns) + per-subsystem lifecycle, controller state machine (NEW → CONNECTING → LIVE → RESETTING → DELETING → DEAD), Identify Controller + Identify NS, namespace scan-work + AEN dispatch (NS_CHANGED rescan, ANA_CHANGE multipath update, FW_ACT_STARTING), per-controller chardev /dev/nvme<N> with admin-cmd opcode allowlist, per-namespace blockdev, sanitize/format/SED-Opal/PR dispatch, reset state machine + kick_requeue_lists. 10 REQ / 11 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (UAF + state-transition + nsid-OOB + AEN-overflow) / Layer-2 ref to ctrl_reset.tla / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus enumerate equivalence.
- kernel/dma/swiotlb.md: covers kernel/dma/swiotlb.c — software bounce-buffer for restricted-DMA-mask + SEV/SEV-ES/SEV-SNP/TDX confidential-guest forced path; per-pool slot-tracking with per-NUMA-area split for scaling, per-area lock + per-cpu start-area selection, swiotlb_tbl_map_single/unmap_single/sync_for_cpu/_for_device entry points, debugfs io_tlb_used/_hiwater, tracepoint swiotlb_bounced, per-device restricted-DMA-pool from DT memory-region. 10 REQ / 7 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (UAF + OOB + alloc-overflow + bounce-OOB) / Layer-2 ref to swiotlb_alloc.tla / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus map↔unmap round-trip equivalence.

Total state: 242 .design docs, 100 Tier-2 + 8 Tier-3s. Foundation Tier-3 set covers: device-core + irqdesc + bpf-core + iommu-core + kvm-core + pci-probe + nvme-host-core + dma-swiotlb.

Knowledge pages: design-drivers-nvme-host-core, design-kernel-dma-swiotlb.

Next iter plan: drivers/usb/core-enumerate.md (USB enumeration + hub driver — most-referenced USB foundation) + virt/kvm/x86-mmu-tdp.md (TDP MMU EPT/NPT + page-table walk + invalidation — central KVM x86 hot path).
